positive: Minimalist graphic design centered composition of a stylized golden retriever head silhouette with a dramatic floral arrangement framing it, embodying sophisticated nature-meets-pop-art. The style should be highly contrasted, utilizing solid matte black and bright, dusty rose/sage green color palette, with gold leaf accents for a premium feel. The golden retriever silhouette should look joyful and noble. The floral elements are abstract and botanical, rendered with clean, stylized lines, almost like woodcut engraving merged with modern vector art. Composition must be perfectly circular and centered, ensuring clean edges for apparel printing. Clean vectors, strong contrast, symmetry, print-ready, high resolution, negative space optimization.
